study_title: Digital Cognitive Behavioral Therapy for Chronic Insomnia (SLEEP-WELL)
design_summary: 9-week, single-arm study of a self-guided digital CBT-I program. Participants complete a daily sleep diary in the study app and weekly program modules.

criteria.text: Trouble falling asleep or staying asleep on 3 or more nights per week.
criteria.probe: On how many nights per week do you have trouble falling asleep or staying asleep?
criteria.unknown_rule: If the participant cannot give a usable estimate of affected nights per week, INC2 is unknown.

criteria.text: Sleep problems have been present for at least 3 months.
criteria.probe: How long have these sleep problems been going on?

criteria.text: Owns a smartphone and is willing to complete a daily sleep diary in the study app.
criteria.probe: Do you own a smartphone, and would you be willing to fill in a short daily sleep diary in our app?

criteria.text: Willing to participate for the full 9 weeks.
criteria.probe: The program runs a full 9 weeks - is that a commitment you can make?

criteria.text: Diagnosed sleep apnea that is NOT currently being treated. (Sleep apnea treated with CPAP or another prescribed therapy is acceptable.)
criteria.probe: Have you been diagnosed with sleep apnea, and if so, are you currently treating it, for example with CPAP?

criteria.text: Works overnight shifts or rotating shifts that include nights.
criteria.probe: Do you work overnight or rotating shifts?

criteria.text: Started a prescription sleep medication, or changed the dose of one, within the past 4 weeks.
criteria.probe: Have you started a prescription sleep medication, or changed the dose of one, in the past four weeks?

criteria.text: Currently enrolled in another interventional clinical trial or structured sleep program.
criteria.probe: Are you currently enrolled in another clinical trial or a structured sleep program?
